name: dreambeesai
author: CardSorting/DreamBeesAI Contributors
description: A high-performance, real-time chat interface for the **Nano Banana 2** model.

scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "SOKETI,BACKND,FRONT" -c "magenta,blue,green" "npm run start:soketi" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
